ocr_findings.description: Gantt chart table captures task names and date-range column headers correctly but loses all bar fill patterns (予定/実績 shading). The table is rendered as blank cells. Cosmetic loss; legend text '予定　実績' is captured.

Arrow diagram (アローダイアグラムの例) rendered as ASCII art in a code block. Circle nodes (○) and arrow directions are represented but the visual node connections (dashed dummy arrow between B-merge and E nodes) are not fully clear. Meaning is inferable from surrounding text.

reviewer_notes: Page 258 covers ガントチャート and アローダイアグラム. All explanatory text including PERT definition captured accurately. Both findings are cosmetic/low severity. The cleaned version handles the diagram better than raw OCR would.
